comment: "The explanations of the different types of repairs with the diagrams was very helpful. Especially when the prof marked out on the images how he would mark the patient prior to cutting."
"A well worded lecture with emphasis on proper techniques, their advantages and disadvantages. Real case depictions also helped."
"I enjoyed the explanations as to why there may be lip deformities post surgery, and why fistulae at the incisive foramen are hard to heal."
"The course is very useful and it's time to apply it to make one smile at a time in as many patients as possible."
"This course is truly helpful in lower resource countries."
"The unilateral cleft lip repair lecture was so enriching and well explained."
